name: power_of_2_base_optimization_with_signed_exponent
description: Code should include power expression where base is a power of 2 (e.g., 128) and exponent is a signed expression that can produce negative values, triggering incorrect optimization in opt_expr

name: pow_cell_power_of_2_base_with_signal_exponent
description: Code should include $pow cell where A port connects to a power-of-2 constant (2, 128, 256, etc.) and B port is a signal or operation, subject to unsigned-only optimization constraint in opt_expr

name: unsigned_base_power_with_signed_arithmetic_exponent
description: Code should include power expression where unsigned base signal is raised to exponent derived from signed arithmetic that can produce negative values, exposing unsigned-only optimization constraint flaw
